market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Europe sees ‘hyperconcentration’ of crypto wrench attacks as losses hit $101M
articles.description: Criminal teams behind wrench attacks usually consist of three to five people, often posing as delivery drivers or luring victims into ambushes, said CertiK.

articles.title: Australian police seize $4.1M in Bitcoin tied to darknet market
articles.description: NSW Police said the Bitcoin was allegedly linked to illegal darknet marketplace activity involving drugs and weapons.

articles.title: How AI became crypto's favorite reason to cut staff
articles.description: Coinbase, Block and Crypto.com have all cited AI to justify recent cuts, though Scale AI’s Jason Droege suspects companies are using the technology as cover.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) gains 6.3%, leading index higher
articles.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 5.8% from Thursday, was also a top performer.

articles.title: Stablecoins have their 'permission slip.' Now comes the hard part.
articles.description: Executives from MoonPay, Ripple and Paxos said at Consensus Miami 2026 that regulation has accelerated stablecoin adoption, but infrastructure, privacy and distribution remain major hurdles.

articles.title: Lime, the Uber-backed micromobility company, files for IPO
articles.description: After years of hints and preparation, Lime plans to enter the public markets.

articles.title: Coinbase bulls point to crypto legislation and stablecoins after earnings miss
articles.description: Analysts say Coinbase’s long-term growth may depend more on stablecoins and U.S. crypto legislation than a rebound in trading activity.

articles.title: The biggest U.S. power grid is under strain from AI — and no one is happy
articles.description: PJM Interconnection — which oversees the grid for some of the densest data center developments on Earth — wants to overhaul itself. Not everyone thinks it's up to the task.

articles.title: Stablecoins won’t strengthen global role of euro, ECB’s Lagarde says
articles.description: ECB President Christine Lagarde said Europe should build tokenized settlement infrastructure anchored by central bank money rather than rely on private stablecoins.

articles.title: Airbnb says AI now writes 60% of its new code
articles.description: Airbnb also said its customer support AI bot now handles 40% of issues without escalating to a human agent.

articles.title: U.S. added 115K jobs in April, nearly doubling expectations
articles.description: The data comes ahead of what's expected to be a new Federal Reserve chairman taking the reins at the U.S. central bank later this month.

articles.title: Revolut users report Bitcoin price glitch showing BTC at 2 cents
articles.description: The apparent pricing error was not reflected across broader crypto markets, suggesting a platform-specific data or display issue.
